# Kim's Blinds

> Kim's Blinds supplies blinds, awnings, security doors and screens, fly screens, panel glides, plantation shutters and curtains from Oak Flats NSW.

## Verified business details
- Phone: 02 4256 1297
- Email: info@kimsblinds.com.au
- Address: Unit 5, 147 Industrial Rd, Oak Flats NSW 2529
- Hours: Monday to Thursday 9am-4.30pm, Friday 9am-3.30pm, Saturday and Sunday closed
- Offers: free measure and quote, locally made products, family owned and operated, 100% quality assurance

## Indexable content policy
- Main service pages: 13
- Main suburb hubs: 18
- In-depth buying guides: 8
- Broader suburb and service-suburb combinations exist for users but stay out of the sitemap unless they add genuine local value.
